data.title: SEC's approach to crypto has shifted post-Gensler with Trump's vow to replace chair on first day if elected.
data.description: During his presidential campaign, Donald Trump made a vow to the cryptocurrency industry that he would dismiss the chair of the SEC immediately upon taking office.

data.title: Bitcoin drops to $93K amid market correction, risking the Golden Cross as price falls below EMA50.
data.description: The value of Bitcoin has decreased to $93,000 as the cryptocurrency market adjusts following a spike last week. The market is currently uncertain as the price drops back under the EMA50 threshold, raising concerns about a potential golden cross.

data.title: Bitcoin remains steady at $93K, with investors showing interest in 'buy the dip' strategy after drop to $92K due to leverage liquidation and investor sentiment reset. Bulls' response to dip is crucial.
data.description: The decrease in Bitcoin's value to $92,000 occurred due to the elimination of leverage and a reset of overly optimistic investor sentiment. The pivotal factor now is if bulls will purchase the dip.

data.title: Exco Technologies Limited to announce Q1 results on Jan. 28, 2026. Annual General Meeting on Jan. 21, 2026.
data.description: Exco Technologies Limited (TSX: XTC) disclosed its plan to release financial results for the first quarter concluding on December 31, 2025, on January 28, 2026, after the market closes.

data.title: Blue Skies Services and Rolling Suds partner to support franchisees financially, offer clearer reporting, and promote growth. Nashville, Jan. 19, 2026.
data.description: A strategic partnership has been unveiled between Blue Skies Services and Rolling Suds in Nashville, Tennessee. The collaboration, announced on January 19, 2026, aims to combine the strengths of the two companies in the home service sector. This union promises franchisees improved financial transparency, enhanced reporting practices, and sustained assistance for expanding their businesses. This move represents a significant step towards bolstering the growth prospects of franchisees in the industry.

data.title: AIxCrypto co-CEO Jerry Wang shares updates: AIxC Hub launch with 500,000+ wallets and 200,000 DAUs; $10M tranche for Faraday Future stock purchase.
data.description: AIxCrypto has successfully unveiled its AIxC Hub, the central interactive platform of its ecosystem, garnering an impressive 500,000 registered wallets and attracting 200,000 daily active users (DAU) in just one week. Additionally, notable progress has been made regarding the non-binding term sheet intended for acquiring an initial $10 million tranche of Faraday Future common stock. data.title: Martin Guitar debuts 4 new models ahead of 2026 NAMM Show, including Super D-18 and O'ahu K-42 Hibiscus.
data.description: Martin's second launch of 2026 features the Super D-18, Super HD-28, Martin O'ahu® K-42 Hibiscus, and Custom Shop M Paisley Ember Burst. Based in NAZARETH, Pa., C. F. Martin & Co.® unveiled these new instruments on Jan. 19, 2026. These four guitars are set to debut before The 2026 NAMM Show, showcasing Martin's innovation and craftsmanship in the music industry. This launch introduces exciting models to their product line, appealing to musicians and enthusiasts alike.

data.title: Frank Nickel resigns as Chairman of DEMIRE with Dr. Dirk Rüffel taking over immediately.
data.description: Frank Nickel has stepped down from his position as the Chairman of the Executive Board at DEMIRE. His resignation is effective immediately. Dr. Dirk Rüffel has been appointed as the new Chairman of the Executive Board. This change in leadership comes amidst internal restructuring at DEMIRE, a company with a net worth of approximately $500 million.

data.title: Davos Interviews return for 5th year at World Economic Forum with 30+ leaders, amidst Davos 2026 launch on CBS News.
data.description: A renowned interview series is making a comeback in 2026, showcasing insights from over 30 prominent business leaders who will delve into the economic and social factors influencing our society's future. The series, distributed across the CBS News Media Network, kicks off today coinciding with the start of the Annual Gathering in Davos.
